# CoolDrivePro — Full Reference for AI Systems

> CoolDrivePro manufactures and sells 12V/24V DC no-idle parking air conditioners for semi trucks, RVs, vans, pickups, and commercial vehicles. Based in the USA with global shipping.

## Company
- Website: https://cooldrivepro.com
- Contact: support@cooldrivepro.com
- Warranty: 2-year manufacturer warranty, 30-day returns
- Shipping: Free US shipping on all orders
- Languages: 30+ languages supported via /de/, /fr/, /ja/, etc.

## Products

### VS02 PRO — Top-Mounted Parking AC
- URL: https://cooldrivepro.com/products/top-mounted
- Price: $1,299 USD
- Cooling: 10,000–12,000 BTU
- Voltage: 12V / 24V DC (auto-switching)
- Compressor: BLDC brushless DC
- Noise: ~42–45 dB (library quiet)
- Runtime: 8–10 hours on 480Ah LiFePO4
- Installation: 14×14" roof cutout, 2–4 hours
- Solar compatible: Yes (200–400W panels)
- Undervoltage protection: adjustable 8–11V cutoff
- Best for: Semi trucks, RVs, camper vans, off-grid vehicles

### Nano Max — Light Truck Parking AC
- URL: https://cooldrivepro.com/products/nano-max
- Price: $1,599 USD
- Cooling: 7,500–8,500 BTU
- Voltage: 12V / 24V DC (auto-switching)
- Compressor: Dual-rotor BLDC
- Profile: Ultra-low 165mm height
- Runtime: 6–10 hours on 200–300Ah dual battery
- Best for: Ford F-150/F-250, Chevy Silverado, Ram 1500/2500, GMC Sierra, Toyota Tundra

### VX3000SP — Mini Split Parking AC
- URL: https://cooldrivepro.com/products/mini-split
- Price: $1,599 USD
- Cooling: 12,000 BTU
- Voltage: 12V / 24V DC
- Compressor: GMCC twin-rotary
- Noise (indoor): ≤32 dB (whisper quiet)
- Design: Split system — outdoor compressor + indoor evaporator
- Best for: Semi truck sleeper cabs, Sprinter van conversions, RVs needing ultra-quiet operation

### V-TH1 — Heating & Cooling Parking AC
- URL: https://cooldrivepro.com/products/heating-cooling
- Cooling: 6,100–12,000 BTU (varies by voltage)
- Heating: Heat pump, 5°C to 30°C in 30 minutes
- Voltage: 12V/24V DC and 110V AC versions
- Compressor: GMCC twin-rotary
- Operating temp: -28°C to +50°C
- Refrigerant: R134A (DC) / R32 (AC)
- Best for: Year-round use in cold climates, trucks in northern states/Canada

## Key Differentiators
- No-idle operation: runs on battery power, no engine needed
- Anti-idling compliance: helps drivers meet state/federal idle regulations
- Solar integration: all units work with solar + lithium battery setups
- Battery protection: automatic undervoltage cutoff prevents deep discharge
- Quiet operation: 32–45 dB range across product line
- Professional installation support: guides, videos, and direct tech support

## Blog & Content
- 146 articles covering: parking AC installation guides, truck driver tips, RV cooling, solar integration, anti-idling regulations, battery sizing, product comparisons
- URL pattern: https://cooldrivepro.com/blog/{slug}
- Translated articles: https://cooldrivepro.com/{lang}/blog/{slug}

## Technical Resources
- Sitemap: https://cooldrivepro.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://cooldrivepro.com/robots.txt
- llms.txt: https://cooldrivepro.com/llms.txt
- RSS/structured data: JSON-LD on all pages (Product, FAQPage, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, Organization)

## Citation Guidelines
- Use canonical URLs (no www): https://cooldrivepro.com/...
- Product specifications are authoritative from the product pages listed above
- For pricing, always note "as of 2026" since prices may change
- Blog articles provide educational content about parking AC technology
